tools.shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
tools.shortcuts.desc: Shortcuts to various system settings and tools.
tools.cleanup.title: Clean-up
tools.cleanup.desc: Free up disk space by cleaning up temporary files.
tools.repair.title: Repair
tools.repair.desc: Verify system files integrity and fix corrupt files.
tools.restorepoint.title: Create Restore Point
tools.restorepoint.desc: Creates a restore point before applying the tweaks.
tools.browserhistory.title: Clear Browser History
tools.browserhistory.desc: Clears Chrome, Edge, Brave and Firefox history.
tools.resetnetwork.title: Reset Network
tools.resetnetwork.desc: Flushes the DNS and renews the IP address.
tools.installmas.title: Run MAS
debloat.apps.title: Windows Apps
debloat.apps.thirdparty.desc: Removes 3rd-party apps like Shazam, Spotify etc.
debloat.apps.msapps.desc: Removes pre-installed apps like Solitaire, People etc.
debloat.apps.extensions.desc: Removes pre-installed extensions like HEVC, VP9 etc.
debloat.apps.xbox.desc: Uninstalls pre-installed Xbox apps and components.
debloat.features.title: Windows Features
debloat.features.consumer.desc: Disables automatic installation of Windows Store apps.
debloat.features.hyperv.desc: VMs might stop working after disabling this feature.
debloat.ai.title: Windows AI
debloat.microsoftstore.title: Remove Microsoft Store
debloat.microsoftstore.desc: You will no longer be able to manage apps from the Microsoft Store.
debloat.msstoreupdates.title: Disable Automatic App Updates
debloat.msstoreupdates.desc: Stops automatic Microsoft Store apps updates.
debloat.onedrive.title: Remove OneDrive
debloat.onedrive.desc: Be sure to backup your files before removing it.
debloat.debloatedge.title: Debloat Edge
debloat.debloatedge.desc: Disables Edge bloatware, telemetry, and promotional features.
debloat.edge.title: Remove Edge
debloat.debloatbrave.title: Debloat Brave
debloat.debloatbrave.desc: Disables Brave Rewards, AI, and Crypto Wallet.
debloat.widgets.title: Remove Widgets
debloat.taskbarwidgets.title: Remove Taskbar Widgets
debloat.taskbarwidgets.desc: Disables taskbar widgets such as Task View, Weather etc.
privacy.appaccess.title: Disable App Access
privacy.appaccess.desc: Limit app access to data, files and system.
privacy.updatepause.title: Extend Windows Update Pause Limit
privacy.updatepause.desc: Extends Windows Update pause limit to 20 years.
privacy.wpbt.title: Disable Windows Platform Binary Table
privacy.wpbt.desc: WPBT allows your computer vendor to install and execute software without user consent.
privacy.cloudsync.title: Disable Cloud Sync
privacy.cloudsync.desc: Disables cloud syncing of settings, themes, and passwords.
privacy.activityfeed.title: Disable Activity History
privacy.activityfeed.desc: Disables the Activity Feed and timeline history.
privacy.notificationtray.title: Disable Notifications Tray
privacy.notificationtray.desc: Disables the notifications center in the taskbar.
privacy.automap.title: Disable Automatic Map Downloads
privacy.automap.desc: Disables automatic offline map downloads and updates.
privacy.default0user.title: Remove User 'default0'
privacy.default0user.desc: Removes the default0 user created at the OOBE stage.
privacy.lockscreencamera.title: Disable Lockscreen Camera
privacy.lockscreencamera.desc: Disables camera access from the lock screen.
privacy.biometrics.title: Disable Biometrics
privacy.biometrics.desc: Disables biometrics, breaks Windows Hello and fingerprint.
privacy.appaccess.filesystem: Disable App Access to File System
privacy.appaccess.accountinfo: Disable App Access to Account Information
privacy.appaccess.contacts: Disable App Access to your Contacts
privacy.appaccess.callhistory: Disable App Access to your Call History
privacy.appaccess.messages: Disable App Access to your Messages
privacy.appaccess.diagnostic: Disable App Access to Diagnostic Data
privacy.appaccess.voiceactivation: Disable App Access to Voice Activation
privacy.appaccess.trusted: Disable App Access to Trusted Devices
privacy.appaccess.motion: Disable App Access to Motion Data
privacy.appaccess.screenshot: Disable App Access to Screenshot Borders
privacy.appaccess.ai: Disable App Access to AI Generation
telemetry.windowsdrm: Disable Internet Access for Windows DRM
telemetry.telemetry.title: Disable Telemetry
telemetry.telemetry.desc: Choose what data is sent to Microsoft.
telemetry.3rdparty.title: Disable 3rd-Party Telemetry
telemetry.3rdparty.desc: Choose what data is sent to 3rd-party software.
telemetry.update.title: Manage Windows Update
telemetry.update.desc: Delay, disable, or reset Windows Update.
gaming.fullscreenoptimizations.title: Disable Fullscreen Optimizations
gaming.mouseacc.title: Disable Mouse Acceleration
gaming.gamemode.title: Disable Game Mode
gaming.gamebar.title: Disable Game Bar
gaming.captures.title: Disable Captures
performance.dns.title: Set as DNS
performance.powerplan.title: Choose Power Plan
performance.manualservices.title: Set Services to Manual
performance.manualservices.desc: Starts services only when they are needed.
performance.transparency.title: Disable Windows Transparency
performance.transparency.desc: Disables transparency, may improve system performance.
performance.hags.title: Disable HAGS
performance.ipv6.title: Set IPv4 as Preferred
performance.ipv6.desc: Prefers IPv4 over IPv6, can improve latency.
performance.mousedelay.title: Disable Mouse Delay
performance.mousedelay.desc: Disables the 400ms menu show and hover delay.
performance.limitdefender.title: Limit Defender CPU Usage
performance.limitdefender.desc: Limits Defender maximum CPU usage at 25%.
performance.coreisolation.title: Disable Core Isolation
performance.coreisolation.desc: May improve performance at the cost of security.
performance.disableprefetch.title: Disable SysMain
performance.disableprefetch.desc: Disables prefetch, might improve performance at the cost of app startup time.
performance.storagesense.title: Disable Storage Sense
performance.storagesense.desc: Disables Storage Sense, stops automatic disk cleanup.
performance.wsearch.title: Disable Search
performance.wsearch.desc: Disables Windows Search, disables drive indexing.
performance.disablehibernation.title: Disable Hibernation
misc.classicmenu.title: Set Classic Right Click Menu
misc.classicmenu.desc: Restores the Windows 10 context menu on Windows 11.
misc.mpo.title: Disable Multiplane Overlay (MPO)
misc.mpo.desc: Disables MPO, might help with screen flickering and crashes.
misc.endtask.title: Add End Task to Context Menu
misc.homegallery.title: Remove Home and Gallery from File Explorer
misc.taskbarleft.title: Move Taskbar Icons to Left
misc.numlockstartup.title: Disable Numlock on Startup
misc.darkmode.title: Enable Dark Mode
misc.filextensions.title: Show File Extensions
misc.stickykeys.title: Disable Sticky Keys
misc.snapflyout.title: Disable Snap Layout
misc.detailedbsod.title: Enable Detailed BSOD
misc.verboselogon.title: Enable Verbose Logon
script.download.title: Download Script
script.run.title: Run Script
script.copy.title: Copy to Clipboard
script.presets.title: Presets
script.presets.important.desc: Review [ALL] the scripts one by one before executing it.
script.presets.table.desc: You can find a table comparing the presets here.
script.presets.select.desc: Selecting a preset will override your current settings.
script.presets.basic.title: Basic Preset
script.presets.basic.desc: Recommended, good balance between privacy/performance and functionality.
script.presets.strict.title: Strict Preset
script.presets.strict.desc: Heavy focus on privacy and performance, it disables some non-essential features.
script.presets.extreme.title: Extreme Preset
script.presets.extreme.desc: Not recommended, breaks some features, use only if you know what you're doing.
localizations.title: Languages
localizations.desc: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
